text.title: Strategy Analysis — Business Need — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: gather-evidence
step.action: Collect ≥2 independent evidence rows per claim.

step.name: quantify-metric
step.action: Define one success metric with measurement source + target.

step.name: baseline-and-signoff
step.action: Document do-nothing baseline; obtain sponsor sign-off.
